name: Invesco Physical Gold ETC GBP Hedged
summary: Invesco Physical Gold ETC GBP Hedged is an exchange traded commodity designed to offer investors a simple, cost-efficient and secure way to access the gold market by holding physical gold bullion, while hedging against fluctuations in the value of the British Pound (GBP) relative to the US Dollar (USD). Each security is backed by physical gold held in allocated storage. The company is based in Jersey, Channel Islands.
